name: golang-github-mitchellh-go-wordwrap-dev
title: golang-github-mitchellh-go-wordwrap-dev
summary: Go package for wrapping words into multiple lines
description:
Go package for wrapping words into multiple lines
This package wraps words to limit the line length to a given number
of characters, which is useful to format output in console programs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-mitchellh-go-wordwrap-dev because Go package for wrapping words into multiple lines.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-mitchellh-go-wordwrap-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-mitchellh-go-wordwrap-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
